title: Abnormal Zombies
body:
![brains back on the menu boys!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc0dc2c8fe36187a1396fdad714f596fc5a23224.png)

this mod adds simple and vanilla friendly zombie variants. mod was inspired by Special Mobs by Father Toast and zombies from terraria. all of these zombies spawns in overworld:

crawling zombie: slow and weak zombie who lost his legs

angry zombie: faster than others, can jump at prey

infested zombie: gruesome undead that drops silverfishes after death

zombie brute: bulkier zombie with higher health, knockback and attack strenght

giant zombie: large and completely immunite to knockback

headache zombie: injured zombie that panic after attack

versions for forge 1.20.1 and popular neoforge versions will be supported 
(sory for my bad english)
